subtopics: Need for measurement, Units of measurement, Systems of units
key_concepts: SI units (fundamental and derived), Significant figures, Uncertainty in result, Dimensions of physical quantities, Dimensional analysis and its applications

subtopics: Frame of reference, Elementary concepts of differentiation and integration for describing motion
key_concepts: Uniform and non-uniform motion, Average speed/velocity, Instantaneous velocity, Uniformly accelerated motion (graphical and calculus treatment), Velocity-time and position-time graphs

subtopics: Scalar and vector quantities, Vector operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication by real number), Resolution of vectors
key_concepts: Position and displacement vectors, Equality of vectors, Unit vectors, Rectangular components, Scalar and Vector product, Projectile motion, Uniform circular motion

Newton's First Law (Law of inertia), Momentum and Newton's Second Law, Impulse, Newton's Third Law, Conservation of linear momentum, Equilibrium of concurrent forces, Static and kinetic friction, Rolling friction, Lubrication, Dynamics of uniform circular motion (Centripetal force)

subtopics: Work done by constant and variable force
key_concepts: Kinetic energy, Work-energy theorem, Power, Potential energy (including spring), Conservative vs non-conservative forces, Motion in a vertical circle, Elastic and inelastic collisions (1D and 2D)

chapters.source_chapter_name: System of Particles and Rotational Motion
subtopics: Centre of mass concepts, Momentum conservation
key_concepts: Two-particle system and rigid body centre of mass (uniform rod), Torque, Angular momentum, Conservation of angular momentum, Equilibrium of rigid bodies, Rigid body rotation equations, Comparison of linear and rotational motions, Moment of inertia, Radius of gyration

subtopics: Kepler's laws, Universal law of gravitation
key_concepts: Acceleration due to gravity (variation with altitude and depth), Gravitational potential energy and potential, Escape speed, Orbital velocity of a satellite, Energy of an orbiting satellite
Hooke's law, Young’s modulus, Bulk modulus, Shear modulus of rigidity (qualitative), Poisson's ratio, Elastic energy, Application of elastic behavior (qualitative)

Viscosity and Stokes' law (terminal velocity), Streamline vs turbulent flow, Critical velocity, Bernoulli's theorem (Torricelli's law, Dynamic lift), Surface energy/tension, Angle of contact, Excess pressure across curved surface, Applications: drops, bubbles, capillary rise

subtopics: Heat, Temperature, Thermal expansion (solids, liquids, gases), Anomalous expansion
key_concepts: Specific heat capacity (Cp, Cv), Calorimetry, Change of state (latent heat), Heat transfer modes (conduction, convection, radiation), Blackbody radiation concepts (Wein's displacement Law, Stefan's law)
Heat, Work, Internal energy, First Law of Thermodynamics, Second Law (state variables, equation of state), Gaseous processes: Isothermal, Adiabatic, Reversible/Irreversible, Cyclic processes

subtopics: Equation of state, Work done in compressing gas
key_concepts: Kinetic theory assumptions and pressure concept, Kinetic interpretation of temperature, RMS speed, Degrees of freedom, Law of equipartition of energy (statement), Specific heat capacities of gases, Mean free path, Avogadro's number
Simple Harmonic Motion (S.H.M) and equations, Uniform circular motion relation to S.H.M, Phase, Loaded spring oscillations (restoring force), Energy in S.H.M., Simple pendulum time period derivation

subtopics: Wave motion types, Speed of travelling wave
key_concepts: Displacement relation for progressive waves, Principle of superposition, Reflection of waves, Standing waves (strings and organ pipes), Fundamental mode and harmonics, Beats
